text:
my WC prediction:

Argentina has the easiest path of all time

I don’t see any team that can be real competition for them

the best team of all time

second trophy in a row

it’s going to be history

mark my words https://t.co/njTL8xgy3n

interesting fact:

people who speak 4+ languages operate on a completely different cognitive level

I speak Polish, English, Russian and Belarusian

I work in two of them every single day (English and Polish)

the sheer amount of background processing my brain cells do just context-switching is insane

lesson: learn more languages

last week I bought this MacBook Air for $1,500

in 5 years I’ll sell it for $3,000

best investment so far https://t.co/J2oO3ji2mN

went to the weekly meeting last week

boss proudly presents a new financial dashboard he "built" over the weekend

used Claude to write all the sql queries didn't verify a single table relationship

the dashboard shows our quarterly revenue is somehow up 400%

I tried to explain that the AI hallucinated the entire data model and is just double-counting the raw exports

boss gets defensive. tells me Claude is optimized for business analytics and I just need to "adapt to the new tech"

now I have to spend my whole week reverse-engineering his spaghetti AI code just to prove we aren't suddenly a fortune 500 company

giving management raw access to LLMs was a massive mistake

back in 2024 a guy farmed Movement airdrop with 36+ accounts

got ~$90,000 from a testnet

with 0 costs

thoughts? https://t.co/oUbvrXZaIf

my last 30 days:

+600 followers
first x payout: $933
0 impressions farmed
some paid gigs

and you still say it's a bear market

stop complaining https://t.co/YQIZf7PKDm

RT @Jampzey: this is what building your personal brand gets you

only 6,666,666 tweets to be a millionaire!

here's how you can deploy your Ritual agent with Claude Code:

(how to get the Access Code check cs)

1. setup

add ritual chain to your wallet:

-> chain id: 1979
-> currency: ritual
-> rpc: https://t.co/7xsNLR1Q0G
-> explorer: https://t.co/iPfUdN2YbF

2. inject the skills

run this in your project root:

"git clone https://t.co/Bjap0Vz8JF .claude/skills/ritual-dapp-skills"

3. paste this into claude code:

"read the file skills/ritual/SKILL.md and follow its instructions.

wallet: 0xYOUR_WALLET.

build me an autonomous agent that [your idea]."

4. the agent takes over

it asks a few questions, picks the right precompiles, and builds in phases:

architecture -> contracts -> frontend -> backend -> testing -> deploy

it verifies each phase and waits for your approval

2021: altseason is coming bro, invest in crypto

benefits of being funny

CT account and a dream https://t.co/9Qjfw7UW2a

RT @0xkekov: everyone was talking about the Quant kid who rugged people on his memecoin

but no one talks about the guy who was live tradin…

what has already happened in the match I decided to skip betting on:

- both teams scored
- total over 3.5 goals
- france is winning the 1st half

but when I actually bet it’s always 0-0

FOMO https://t.co/ftyhCG6eba

everyone was talking about the Quant kid who rugged people on his memecoin

but no one talks about the guy who was live trading it

poor guy https://t.co/EmB60EUO48
RT @hyperNothing_: https://t.co/zdkI3Ur6JZ

my boss told me to rebuild 35 excel files

Claude co-work did everything for me and saved the day

they'll fire me soon.. https://t.co/tVpI3vQlJb

how much I spend at 22 yo living in Europe:

$1,000 rent
$500 groceries / deliveries
$100 online subscriptions
$50 gym membership
$20 public transport
~$500 occasional expenses

total: $2,170 per month

good or bad?

it's over for me

I've decided to stop betting on WC games

1. in this market, the main goal is to save money - strictly lowering risks

2. sports betting isn't about predicting anymore

3. I can't stop myself from making emotional plays

I'll come back to polymarket later https://t.co/is5Yu5kOG3

Claude agent updates me every day

- key insights about my profile (what performs better, why and what to improve)
- at least 3 drafts using my voice (taking it for inspiration later)
- content plan

must have for every content creator nowadays

good tech https://t.co/djeOLnQ6Hw
